name: Elowen Console Table - Threshold™
description:
Go modern with the simple style of this Elowen Console Table from Threshold™. This rectangular console table features a laminated metal frame in a brass finish for a vintage look. The wooden tabletop and built-in bottom shelf complement the frame, and give you ample space for your books, framed photos, plants and more.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
